articles.author: Eric Edholm
articles.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Pick-by-pick analysis for Rounds 6-7 - NFL.com
articles.description: Eric Edholm breaks down Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Draft, providing pick-by-pick analysis for every selection in Rounds 6 and 7. Follow along as we update live!
articles.content:
Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Draft is underway. Eric Edholm provides analysis for every player selected in Rounds 6 and 7 below.
NOTE: Only trades agreed to after Day 1 began are reflected below.
